document_title: Common Beginner User Scenarios for Crypto Auto-Trading Agent
target_users: Crypto users with limited financial or trading background
core_product_flow: User expresses a simple investment or trading goal
Agent collects relevant market, sentiment, news, on-chain, and user-preference data
Agent explains the analysis in beginner-friendly language
Agent generates a trading or investment strategy
User reviews and explicitly approves the strategy
Agent implements the approved strategy automatically with risk controls

scenarios.name: Beginner wants to start investing in Bitcoin or Ethereum

user_profile.typical_concern: The user wants to invest but does not know when or how much to buy.

scenarios.user_goal: Start investing in major crypto assets without buying everything at the wrong time.
scenarios.example_user_input: I have $1,000 and want to invest in Bitcoin, but I do not know if now is a good time.
scenarios.agent_analysis_summary: The agent explains whether the market looks overbought, oversold, volatile, or suitable for gradual entry.

example_strategy: Invest 30% if BTC or ETH drops by 3%
Invest 30% if the asset drops by 6%
generated_strategy.recommended_order_type: Spot buy orders and conditional limit orders

approval_flow.approval_message: Approve this staged investment plan before the agent places any order.
approval_flow.user_action_required: Click Approve, Edit Strategy, or Reject

actions: Place the approved initial buy order
Set conditional buy orders at approved price levels
Notify the user if risk conditions change
automatic_execution_after_approval.execution_limit: The agent only executes the approved strategy and does not place new unapproved trades.

risk_controls: User confirmation before any new strategy change
scenarios.value_to_user: The user can begin investing without needing to understand charts, indicators, or timing decisions.

scenarios.name: User wants to know whether market news creates a buying or selling opportunity

user_profile.typical_concern: The user sees confusing crypto news and does not know whether it is bullish or bearish.

scenarios.user_goal: Translate market news, sentiment, and price movement into a clear trading decision.
scenarios.example_user_input: There is a lot of news about Ethereum today. Should I buy, sell, or wait?

news_and_sentiment_data: Positive, negative, and neutral narrative classification

scenarios.agent_analysis_summary: The agent explains whether the news is likely a short-term hype event, a real fundamental catalyst, or a high-risk market reaction.

example_strategy: Buy a small ETH spot position only if sentiment remains positive and price confirms upward momentum
Avoid trade if volatility is too high
generated_strategy.recommended_order_type: Spot order with stop-loss and take-profit

approval_flow.approval_message: The agent presents the trade thesis, order size, stop-loss, and take-profit before execution.
approval_flow.user_action_required: Approve, adjust order size, switch to paper trading, or reject

actions: Continue monitoring sentiment and notify the user if the thesis changes
automatic_execution_after_approval.execution_limit: The agent cannot increase position size or change exit rules without user approval.

risk_controls: No automatic leverage unless explicitly approved
scenarios.value_to_user: The user does not need to manually interpret news, social sentiment, or on-chain signals.

scenarios.name: User already holds crypto and wants the agent to manage risk

user_profile.typical_concern: The user does not know when to sell, take profit, or cut losses.

scenarios.user_goal: Protect an existing crypto position from large losses and avoid emotional decisions.
scenarios.example_user_input: I already bought BTC. Can you help me manage the position and tell me when to sell?
scenarios.agent_analysis_summary: The agent explains whether the current position should be held, partially reduced, protected with stop-loss, or exited.

example_strategy: Hold the BTC position while price stays above key support
Sell 30% if BTC drops below support
Take profit on 40% if BTC rises by 8%
Send alert if sentiment turns sharply negative
generated_strategy.recommended_order_type: Conditional sell orders, stop-loss orders, and take-profit orders

approval_flow.approval_message: The user must approve all stop-loss, take-profit, or partial-sell rules before the agent places orders.
approval_flow.user_action_required: Approve protection rules, edit thresholds, or reject

actions: Place approved stop-loss or conditional sell orders
Send alerts when the position thesis changes
automatic_execution_after_approval.execution_limit: The agent only manages the position according to the approved rules.

risk_controls: Partial exit instead of full panic sell
scenarios.value_to_user: The user gets disciplined position management without needing to monitor charts all day.

product_positioning_message: The auto-trading agent helps non-expert users convert market data, news, sentiment, and personal goals into clear crypto strategies, then executes only after explicit user approval with built-in risk controls.
